SUMMARY:  INNER | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL:  FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

Class ScrabbleServer

java.lang.Object
  |
  +--ScrabbleServer
public class ScrabbleServer
extends java.lang.Object

A ScrabbleServer object is a server which interacts with 2 different clients (ScrabblePanel) which connect to it.

Constructor Summary
ScrabbleServer()
           
 
Method Summary
static void gameisover(java.io.PrintWriter to, java.io.PrintWriter to2, java.io.BufferedReader from, java.io.BufferedReader from2, boolean usedletters)
          Handles when current player ends the game
static void invalidturn(java.io.BufferedReader from, java.io.PrintWriter to)
          Handles when current player makes an invalid move
static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
          Main method which starts the server, and runs the game until the end when it automatically ends.
static void rejectturn(java.io.BufferedReader from, java.io.PrintWriter to, java.io.PrintWriter to2, LetterList pile)
          Handles when current player passes their turn
static boolean updaterack(java.io.PrintWriter to, java.io.PrintWriter to2, java.io.BufferedReader from, java.io.BufferedReader from2, LetterList pile)
          Updates the current player's rack and if the game ends, runs the gameisover() method.
static void updateremaining(java.io.PrintWriter to, java.io.PrintWriter to2, LetterList pile)
          Updates the remaining letters on both player's screens
static void validturn(java.io.BufferedReader from, java.io.BufferedReader from2, java.io.PrintWriter to, java.io.PrintWriter to2)
          Handles when current player submits a valid move
 
Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object
clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
 

Constructor Detail

ScrabbleServer

public ScrabbleServer()
Method Detail

main

public static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
Main method which starts the server, and runs the game until the end when it automatically ends.

updaterack

public static boolean updaterack(java.io.PrintWriter to,
                                 java.io.PrintWriter to2,
                                 java.io.BufferedReader from,
                                 java.io.BufferedReader from2,
                                 LetterList pile)
                          throws java.io.IOException
Updates the current player's rack and if the game ends, runs the gameisover() method.
Parameters:
to - writer to the current player
to2 - writer to the other player
from - reader from the current player
from2 - reader from the second player
pile - the pile of letters

updateremaining

public static void updateremaining(java.io.PrintWriter to,
                                   java.io.PrintWriter to2,
                                   LetterList pile)
Updates the remaining letters on both player's screens
Parameters:
to - writer to the current player
to2 - writer to the other player
pile - the pile of letters

rejectturn

public static void rejectturn(java.io.BufferedReader from,
                              java.io.PrintWriter to,
                              java.io.PrintWriter to2,
                              LetterList pile)
                       throws java.io.IOException
Handles when current player passes their turn
Parameters:
from - reader from current player
to - writer to current player
to2 - writer to other player
pile - the pile of letters

invalidturn

public static void invalidturn(java.io.BufferedReader from,
                               java.io.PrintWriter to)
                        throws java.io.IOException
Handles when current player makes an invalid move
Parameters:
from - reader from current player
to - writer to other player

validturn

public static void validturn(java.io.BufferedReader from,
                             java.io.BufferedReader from2,
                             java.io.PrintWriter to,
                             java.io.PrintWriter to2)
                      throws java.io.IOException
Handles when current player submits a valid move
Parameters:
from - reader from current player
from2 - reader from other player
to - writer to current player
to2 - writer to other player

gameisover

public static void gameisover(java.io.PrintWriter to,
                              java.io.PrintWriter to2,
                              java.io.BufferedReader from,
                              java.io.BufferedReader from2,
                              boolean usedletters)
                       throws java.io.IOException
Handles when current player ends the game
Parameters:
to - writer to current player
to2 - writer to other player
from - reader from current player
from2 - reader from other player
usedletters - indicates if all the current player's letters were used
